data.title: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: SIEM solutions are integrated for real-time analysis of security alerts.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates Splunk for log management and event monitoring.

data.title: Multi-layer Authentication
data.description: Ensures user accounts are secure with multiple authentication factors.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication is supported for enhanced security.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Uses encryption protocols to protect user data at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Employs TLS and AES-256 for data protection.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability scans and assessments to mitigate security risks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Nessus and Burp Suite for vulnerability scanning.

data.title: Threat Intelligence
data.description: Incorporates threat intelligence feeds to anticipate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Employs solutions that aggregate and analyze threat data from multiple sources.
